title: Issue #17: Add dark mode
summary: Currently, the system does not seem to have a good option for dark mode that respects user preferences. For theming, I would like to implement a global dark mode system where colors are actually from our design system but then still meet all the required accessibility requirements so that the user can read them clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: The change is visible in the recorded app demo.
The app still renders meaningful content at APP_BASE_URL.
The draft PR includes the implementation demo artifact.

beforeSteps.narrationHint: Implementation for GitHub issue 17: Add dark mode

afterSteps.narrationHint: Implementation for GitHub issue 17: Add dark mode
